title: Shout
meaning_summary: Shout still generates value because its chorus and scale make it one of the band's most replayable and sync-friendly recordings.
revenue_drivers: 1980s and classic-pop playlists create steady recurring streams.
Its huge chorus keeps the song culturally easy to remember and reuse.
Long-tail sync and nostalgia demand continue to support the track.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate infers current annual earnings from nostalgia streaming, catalog replay value, and songwriter participation typical for a major crossover hit.

ownership.master_owner: Likely split between label-controlled masters and artist royalty participation
ownership.publishing_owner: Publishing appears materially tied to songwriter-side participation
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No song-specific catalog sale adjustment is assumed here
ownership.notes: This is an inferred gross-to-net range based on current catalog behavior, not a public royalty statement.
